CP3-RF04-027: B-027 — Major Phase B escalation: (1) Jul 19 COMP-RF04-023 (RF-04+RF-05): full-custody threat cluster activated by Melissa's ER hospitalization; DARVO inversion — Eli keeping Olivia appropriately reframed as inadequate parenting; 'She deserves so much better' child-welfare lever; 'There's no threats / just stating my plan of action' DARVO denial after two explicit custody filing threats; (2) Aug 14 COMP-RF04-024 (RF-04+RF-05+RF-11): 'shit father' second dataset instance (first: B-017 Aug 2024); 'You didn't even want her' — new extreme inadequacy allegation; Dr advice framing 'My Dr told me I shouldn't have her around you' — medical professional invoked as implied harm evidence; child counselor relay 'afraid to talk to you' — counselor used as third-party validator; relocation signal 'may move soon' (cross-ref RF-02); (3) 'do you boo' phrase at 3 confirmed instances; (4) 'dumbass' at 8th confirmed instance; (5) Aug 25 beer-spend framing: unprovoked alcoholism insinuation; (6) Aug 26-28 Labor Day visit refusal initiates — Phase B visit-refusal cascade beginning (priority: high)

CP3-RF04-028: B-028 (Phase B/C boundary) — (1) Aug 28-30 'safe environment' retroactive rewrite: Melissa positions prior visit gap as safety judgment, establishing hook for future safety-based gatekeeping; (2) Sep 2 image-based harm allegation ('Why are you smacking her?') — NEW MECHANISM: visual artifact as physical harm evidence; third harm allegation instance; ATTORNEY IMAGE REVIEW REQUIRED (file: 2025-09-02_084204_melissa-moose_2588.jpg); (3) Sep 17 COMP-RF04-025 (RF-04+RF-05): 'agreement ready to sign' — most advanced legal threat in dataset; past-completed attorney consultation with agreement pending signature; (4) 'do you boo' at 4 confirmed instances (B-025 ×1, B-027 ×2, B-028 ×1); (5) Oct 4-7 COMP-RF04-026 (RF-04+RF-11): 'so afraid of you' — new child-fear-of-Eli framing; 'alarming' ×2 sustained child distress relay (priority: high)

CP3-RF04-029: B-029 — Nov 24 ROW-14839 mega-cluster: 'Abby calling her a bad sister and you a bad dad' — first explicit on-record allegation that Abby makes negative characterizations directly to Olivia. Attorney should see full text of ROW-14839. Also: 'Alice took it over makes her feel unwelcome' (family-displacement relay), and third consecutive visit refusal context (Nov 18, Nov 21, Nov 24). Aligns with RF-01 ADD-004 relay mechanism and coaching admission ROW-6819. COMP-RF04-027 (RF-04+RF-01+RF-11+RF-02). Cross-ref: RF-01, RF-11 (priority: high)

CP3-RF04-030: B-029 — Nov 25 ROW-14851-14852 'big contempt case': (1) Melissa threatens contempt for Eli's alleged non-visitation, which is DARVO inversion of her documented gatekeeping (Nov 18/21/24 visit-refusal cascade); (2) 'You didn't remedy your home to be safe' recycles B-028 'safe environment' framing as contemplated legal basis; (3) 'I just called the lawyer' (ROW-14850) indicates active legal consultation. Attorney must review together with COMP-RF04-025 (Sep 17 B-028 'agreement ready to sign') as legal-threat escalation arc. ROW-14841-14848: contempt threats over $30 childcare — legal threat proportionality. COMP-RF04-028 (RF-04+RF-05+RF-02). Cross-ref: RF-05 (priority: high)

CP3-RF04-031: B-030 — Feb 15-16 incident amplification COMP-RF04-029: Eli ADMITS raising his voice during argument with Abby (ROW-15099, ROW-15106) — admitted fact becomes Melissa's amplification scaffold: raised voice → 'verbal abuse' (ROW-15105) → Olivia 'traumatized' (ROW-15108) → 'pause the weekends' child relay as visit-refusal authority (ROW-15108) → 'drinking problem?' insinuation → 'You clearly have a drinking problem' explicit accusation (ROW-15498, Mar 28, six weeks later). Attorney must distinguish: (1) the admitted conduct (raised voice); (2) the amplification trajectory (the pattern). Olivia's stated 'pause the weekends' preference becomes Melissa's stated access-denial justification (RF-02). Cross-ref: RF-11 (Olivia deployed as trauma witness and visit-refusal authority), RF-02 (child relay as gatekeeping mechanism). COMP-RF04-029 (RF-04+RF-11+RF-02). Priority: high

CP3-RF04-032: B-030 — Mar 28 ROW-15498 explicit alcoholism accusation: 'You clearly have a drinking problem and you need to take care of that before seeing her' — first explicit, unambiguous alcoholism allegation in dataset (B-027 Aug 25 ROW-14203 'less than you pay for beer per week' was insinuation; this is direct accusation). Context: 6+ weeks after Feb 15 argument, deployed unprovoked in routine custody message. If Melissa has made any similar allegations to Olivia, counselor, or third parties, this message represents the textual anchor. Cross-ref RF-15 (false allegation trajectory). Also: 'Olivia tells me that you love Milo and Alice more than her' (ROW-15500) in same cluster — child relay as sibling-prioritization accusation; new mechanism. Priority: medium

CP3-RF04-033: B-031 — Apr 12 DARVO bruise cluster COMP-RF04-030: (1) 'Why do you keep trying to make Olivia think I'm abusing her?' (ROW-15588) — 'keep trying' formulation makes a factual claim about Eli's conduct that could be deployed in custody proceedings; attorney should verify no prior instance of Eli asking about abuse vs. welfare checks. (2) ROW-15592 Naomi-peer-parent relay: Melissa's characterization of 'screaming for no reason' about 'valentine weekend' (Feb 15) is now circulating through a peer-parent network — Naomi's father is a potential witness to this characterization; if the narrative reached Olivia's school or other parents, scope extends beyond the text record. (3) COMP-RF04-030 connects to COMP-RF04-029 as next deployment of same incident narrative two months later — trajectory: Feb 15 raised voice → verbal abuse → traumatized → pause weekends → drinking problem (Mar 28) → screaming for no reason / peer-parent network (Apr 12). (4) Eli's responses (ROW-15593, ROW-15596) are measured and factual — contrast documents communication quality differential. Priority: high

session_log.notes: RF-04 pass initialized. B-001 processed (calibration batch): Jan 11 – Oct 2, 2022; 365 SMS messages. 3 primary flags. Arc state: ARC-RF04-001 WATCHING (2 signals); ARC-RF04-002 CANDIDATE (1 signal). CP2 package generated and reviewed. Five addenda applied.

B-002 processed: Oct 3 – Nov 5, 2022; 346 messages. 4 primary flags. ARC-RF04-001 promoted WATCHING → ACTIVE (Halloween cluster Sev 2). ARC-RF04-002 promoted CANDIDATE → WATCHING. COMP-RF04-001 detected (Halloween: RF-04+RF-01+RF-05+RF-09). 1 CP3 item.

ARC-RF04-001 receives 6 new signals (total: 11). COMP-RF04-002 detected (ROW-937-938: false predation allegation, RF-04+RF-15+RF-09+RF-05). Illness-skepticism sub-pattern emerges (3 instances). Abby-as-obstacle framework escalated to false sexual crime allegation territory. 2 CP3 items queued.

B-004 processed: Dec 12 2022 – Jan 18 2023; 369 messages. 3 primary flags (2 Sev-1, 1 Sev-2). Surgery period (Dec 29 – Jan 15) is cooperative RF-04-free zone. Pre-surgery window (Dec 20-28): 3 flags including surgery morning Sev 2 cluster (ROW-1284-1287). ARC-RF04-001 adds 3 signals (total: 14). COMP-RF04-003 detected (surgery morning: RF-04+RF-15+RF-01). Uncle/dad predation framing confirmed recurring (2nd instance, ROW-1287). 1 CP3 item queued (total pending: 3).

B-005 processed: Jan 18 – Feb 22 2023; 378 messages. 2 primary flags (1 Sev-1, 1 Sev-2). Near-clean batch (conflict ratio ~0.07). Two RF-04 clusters: ROW-1683 (Feb 10, illness-skepticism #4 + Abby-as-obstacle, Sev 1) and ROW-1715-1789 (Feb 15, car accident/scammer sustained attack, Sev 2 — 'Are you dumb?' 4th instance, partial DARVO via ROW-1722 gaslighting accusation, moral character attacks). ARC-RF04-001 adds 2 signals (total: 16). COMP-RF04-004 detected (RF-04+RF-09+RF-01+RF-05). ARC-RF04-002 unchanged (near-boundary ROW-1599-1601 not counted). 1 CP3 item queued (total pending: 5).

A girl he met when she was 7') + religious attack (ROW-2186) + inadequate-father + martyrdom (ROW-2191). COMP-RF04-006. ARC-RF04-001 adds 2 signals (total: 18).
